title: Nocturne Sessions duotone gig poster: two-tone artist-photo FX + wordmark vectorize + InDesign template merge to print PDF/JPEG
one_line_ask: Give the raw band press photo a bold two-tone (duotone) FX treatment, vectorize the supplied Nocturne Sessions wordmark, then run the client's authored InDesign gig-poster template through a data-merge against the event-copy CSV to export a print-ready PDF and a high-res JPEG.

issues: Checkerboard pattern visible in background suggests transparency layer rendered as grey checker rather than true transparent PNG — acceptable as source file artifact for designer to resolve
Faint shadow/offset duplicate text visible behind main letterforms (print-unsafe near-identical tones) — within brief tolerance but designer should clean
Slight luminance noise across background checker — within brief tolerance

Moog Minimoog (or similar) synthesizer is a real-world identifiable branded product — the distinctive wood-panel mini keyboard with Moog-style layout is recognizable and may constitute a real trademark/brand visibility issue
Slight compression artifact visible around the fluorescent ceiling light fixture
Right-side person's left hand partially obscured/cropped at frame edge

assets.name: nocturne_poster_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
